/usr/bin/mpicxx -O3 -DNDEBUG CMakeFiles/parallelfor_test.dir/miniWeather_mpi_parallelfor.cpp.o CMakeFiles/parallelfor_test.dir/cmake_device_link.o -o parallelfor_test   -L/usr/local/cuda-12.6/targets/x86_64-linux/lib/stubs  -L/usr/local/cuda-12.6/targets/x86_64-linux/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/usr/local/cuda-12.6/targets/x86_64-linux/lib /usr/local/cuda-12.6/targets/x86_64-linux/lib/libcufft.so -lcudadevrt -lcudart_static -lrt -lpthread -ldl
